pi_items.source: Database setup creates schools table with Demo School id=1 (direct_db_setup.sh:93)
Task description and metadata define the target room to be added (task.json:22, export_result.sh:14)
Task description and metadata define the target room capacity (task.json:23, export_result.sh:14)
Task description and metadata define the target room to be added (task.json:26, export_result.sh:14)
Task description and metadata define the target room capacity (task.json:27, export_result.sh:14)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically created OpenSIS instance (v9.2) deployed in a test environment. The admin user 'admin' with password 'Admin@123' is configured during environment setup. The target is Demo School with school_id=1. The task requires adding two rooms: SCI-201 with capacity 30 and COMP-305 with capacity 25. The verifier checks: (1) both rooms exist with correct capacities in the database, (2) room count increases by at least 2, and (3) VLM confirms navigation to the Rooms interface.
